articles.metaDescription: A 14-year-old girl gave birth to a son on Tuesday at the district hospital in Pithoragarh, following which a case was registered against the father of the newborn, officials said.
articles.summary: A case was registered against the father of the newborn, officials said. A 14-year-old girl gave birth to a son on Tuesday at the district hospital in Pithoragarh.

articles.title: 1 Dead, Over 100 Students Hospitalised After Eating Mid-Day Meal In Odisha
articles.metaDescription: Over 100 students fell ill and one of them, a Class 5 student, died on Tuesday, two days after having a meal at a government-run tribal residential school in Odisha's Mayurbhanj district.
articles.summary: Over 100 students fell ill after having a meal at a tribal residential school in Odisha. One of them, a Class 5 student, died on Tuesday.

articles.title: Edmonton Oilers star Connor McDavid’s $20M projection fuels future contract possibilities with Toronto Maple Leafs
articles.metaDescription: An NHL agent poll suggests Connor McDavid could secure a record $20 million annual contract, with the Toronto Maple Leafs emerging as a potential destination. While he remains with the Edmonton Oilers
articles.summary: An NHL agent poll suggests Connor McDavid could win a record $20 million contract. The Toronto Maple Leafs could be a potential destination for McDavid.
